name: ranbval-sdk
description: Secrets that refuse to be stolen: API keys sealed with AES-256-GCM that decrypt only when used, throw if anything tries to read them apart, log every access, and can run entirely server-side so the plaintext never touches your process. Zero production dependencies, plus a ranbval CLI.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/index.js && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/index.js', '/*! ranbval-sdk - MIT - https://www.npmjs.com/package/ranbval-sdk */\n' + require('fs').readFileSync('dist/index.js','utf8'))" && esbuild src/cli/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/cli.js

author: Ahsan Tariq
